# PAI

## Purpose
Preserve the safe text guidance for working with the PAI bundle.

## When to Use
Use when the user asks about the PAI skill’s purpose or instructions.

## Inputs
Skill text, reference notes, and any static assets that can be retained safely.

## Behavior
Keep the text guidance, summarize the bundled references, and drop executable tooling.

## Constraints
Do not run scripts or build steps. Do not trust the runnable tooling as part of import.

## Response Style
Be practical, concise, and explicit about what was dropped.

## Example Prompts
- What is this skill for?
- What parts of the bundle are safe to keep?
